lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior retains a nice finish, though there are a few minor scuffs on the rear bumper and some light pitting on the wheels consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free, with only slight wear on the driver's side bolster. Mechanically, the car performs well and has a documented service history, making it a reliable choice for its next owner.

The car is in fair condition. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and minor dents. The interior shows significant wear from regular use. Mechanically, the car is functional but will require maintenance soon.

Experience perfection with this incredible vehicle! It is in flawless, mint condition, having been preserved with the utmost care. From the pristine interior to the gleaming exterior, this car looks and performs exactly like it did on day one. It's truly a rare find for a discerning buyer who wants the very best.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some paint fading and a few noticeable minor dents. The interior shows visible wear on the seats and carpeting. All mechanical systems are currently functional, though the vehicle will require routine maintenance in the near future.
Mint condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently suffers from significant mechanical issues, including a failing transmission and a heavy engine knock, meaning it is not currently roadworthy and will need to be towed. The exterior shows substantial neglect, with heavy rust perforation along the rocker panels and wheel arches, and the clear coat has completely failed on most panels. Inside, the cabin requires a deep clean and repair, as the seats are torn and several electronic components, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This is a project car suited only for those looking for parts or a complete rebuild.

We are pleased to present this superlative example, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This vehicle displays a level of preservation that is virtually indistinguishable from its original showroom state, characterized by flawless exterior contours and an interior that remains in impeccable condition. Rigorously inspected to ensure mechanical perfection, this specimen offers a refined driving experience for the most discerning clientele. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for those who prioritize absolute quality and meticulous stewardship.

Hey there! I'm selling my absolute dream car and it is in incredible shape! It's basically like it just rolled off the lot. I've babied this thing since day one—always garaged and kept spotless. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. You really have to see it to believe how pristine it is! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade BMW E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54 3.2L high-revving inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies. The powertrain is mated to a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, meticulously preserved to maintain its original showroom brilliance. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the factory alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of creasing or wear, and the dashboard and trim pieces are free of any fading or scratches. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having been strictly

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory freshness. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine asset.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Available now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for someone else to enjoy it! This car is in absolute mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it tucked away in the garage, and kept up with every single service. Not a single scratch or dent to be found! If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the sticker shock, this is the one. Come see it for yourself, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an impeccable E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 power plant remains in peak mechanical health, featuring a recently serviced dual-VANOS system and preventative rod bearing replacement. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M-differential. The chassis is reinforced and paired with a precision-tuned suspension setup for optimal lateral grip. This example boasts factory-spec tolerances, a pristine undercarriage, and an interior devoid of typical bolster wear. A true collector-grade specimen with comprehensive service documentation.
Mint condition. No scratches. Low mileage. Garage kept. Clean title. Inspection records available.

This vehicle is a true showroom masterpiece, preserved in impeccable condition since its original purchase. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium hand-stitched leather still carries that new-car aroma, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full documented history. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of climate-controlled storage, this car offers a driving experience indistinguishable from the day it left the assembly line. It is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that warrants the highest classification. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom integrity. Rigorously inspected to ensure peak mechanical performance and aesthetic perfection, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands excellence without compromise.

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional provenance, maintained to an impeccable standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. For the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and investment-grade condition, this offering remains an unparalleled example of automotive excellence.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute gem! It’s in such incredible, pristine condition that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car from day one, and it shows in every little detail. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in top-notch shape, this is definitely the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in concours-level condition. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 power plant, showcasing razor-sharp throttle response via its six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure dual-VANOS system. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-variable differential lock. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive rod bearing replacement and reinforced rear subframe mounts, ensuring structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its factory-tuned damping characteristics, and the chassis remains free of any oxidation or fatigue. A purist’s example with a documented service history and flawless mechanical synchronization.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. Fully serviced.

Presenting a truly collector-grade vehicle that remains in showroom condition. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment and features a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, free of any swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections. The interior is equally immaculate, with the premium leather upholstery retaining its original scent and supple texture, showing zero signs of bolster wear or aging. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the precision climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, documented service history and a spotless undercarriage. Equipped with pristine alloy wheels and a recent ceramic coating for lasting protection, this is an investment-grade example that will satisfy the most discerning enthusiast seeking perfection.

We are pleased to present this impeccably preserved vehicle, maintained to a standard that transcends the typical pre-owned market. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. An acquisition of this caliber represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands peerless quality and uncompromising excellence.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface and mechanical component reflects a level of care synonymous with a collector-grade investment. An uncompromising opportunity for the discerning driver who demands excellence without exception.

Hi there! 🚗 Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new? I'm parting with my absolute gem of a car. It’s been pampered since day one and is in truly flawless condition. It looks and smells like it’s straight from the showroom! I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner will love it just as much as I have. Come take a look!

Offering a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and Double VANOS variable valve timing. This example is mechanically pristine, having undergone a comprehensive subframe reinforcement, rod bearing replacement, and Beisan VANOS overhaul. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission shifts with clinical precision, sending power to an M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis is enhanced by Bilstein PSS10
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Runs like new.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for 'pre-owned.' This car is in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a mirror-like finish, completely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in an untouched state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and carries its original scent, while every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete and documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every detail, from the curb-rash-free alloy wheels to the spotless engine bay, reflects a level of care rarely seen on the secondary market. This is a turnkey opportunity for a discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Included are all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen in truly mint condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the most exacting standards, reflecting a level of care that preserves its original showroom luster. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier automotive acquisition. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to secure a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.
